# CANDIDATE: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER_EXTENDED_WINDOW

**Filed:** 2026-06-18  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Extending the ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER watcher's entry window from 10:00-12:30 ET to 10:00-13:30 ET will increase the daily observation rate of long-only ORB retests, accelerating progress toward the OP-21 gate (N≥100 new observations, WR≥55%) without significantly degrading win rate, as the ORB edge demonstrates persistence into the early afternoon in trending regimes (per OOS strength in 2025-Q2/2026-Q2 data).

## Mechanism

The ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER watcher currently triggers on long-only ORB retests within MAX_BARS_AWAIT_RETEST=8 bars (30 minutes) after the breakout bar, constrained to 10:00-12:30 ET via existing time gates. This proposal increases MAX_BARS_AWAIT_RETEST to 16 bars (60 minutes) and extends the time gate to 13:30 ET, allowing entries up to 13:30 ET. Entry logic remains: ORB breakout above ORH, retest to within $0.20 of ORH from above, close above ORH on green bar. Exit logic remains chart-stop-only (premium_stop_pct=-0.99, chart stop at ORH) with TP1 at ORH + 50% × or_range (sell ⅔) and runner at ORH + 100% × or_range (trail via ribbon or breakeven after TP1), consistent with validated real-fills parameters.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (per OP-20 disclosure 1 baseline).
2. **Sample bias:** Proposal based on limited observational sample (N=285 long ORB observations as of 2026-05-24); risk of overfit to recent trending regime (Q2-2026 concentration = 85% of P&L). Extension may dilute edge if afternoon ORB retests have lower fidelity.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window required to validate temporal stability of extended window).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J days validation needed for extended window configuration; chart-stop-only assumption must hold).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: extended window admits low-quality retests in choppy markets (e.g., VIX<15), increasing losses; max drawdown scenario: consecutive false retests during range-bound days eroding gains; blow-up scenario: extended window captures volatile afternoon reversals triggering premature stops.
6. **Concentration:** If top-5 days = X% of P&L, state X: Current long-ORB concentration (Q2-2026 alone) = 85%; extended window may increase concentration if afternoon ORB retests cluster in same regime (NEEDS measurement post-implementation).

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators (orb_watcher.py unit tests), walk-forward (OOS/IS ratio ≥0.50), real-fills (N≥10 chart-stop-only WR≥60% on top 3 J days), and OP-21 gate progress tracking (weekly observation count/WR report).

## Confidence

5 / 10 -- Reasonable hypothesis based on observed ORB retest timing in leaderboard data (e.g., 5/04 ORB retest at 10:27 ET), but lacks quantitative validation for window extension impact on WR and observation rate.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (rank 5) by increasing its observation throughput; conflicts with ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE (rank 4) which relies on narrow OR-range (<2.0) for high WR. No direct conflict with other candidates as watcher-only proposal. May aid ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER's path to OP-21 promotion (currently NEEDS-MORE-DATA).
